reviews.comment:
Las habitaciones son algo chicas, pero impecables. El servicio debe mejorar una sola persona no puede hacer todo. La ubicación muy cómoda, pero ruidos de equipos y al estar tan sobre la ruta es algo ruidosa. Tenían mucho espacio para haberlo hecho más alejado. El parque muy bueno. Faltaron sillas para las mesitas redondas solo una habitación tenía dos.

(Translated by Google)
The rooms are a bit small, but spotless. The service needs improvement; one person can't do everything. The location is very convenient, but there's some noise from the equipment, and being so close to the main road makes it a bit noisy. They had plenty of space and could have built it further away. The grounds are very nice. There weren't enough chairs for the round tables; only one room had two.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTURnMjRXeXlBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Hermoso lugar. Buen servicio la visité de regreso de viaje a la Patagonia volviendo a Capital federal

(Translated by Google)
Beautiful place. Good service. I visited it on my way back from a trip to Patagonia, returning to Buenos Aires.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTURneFoyWXFBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Paramos a almorzar en la estación de servicio , por los precios de los menú esperábamos algo más abundante. La milanesa con papas trajo literalmente 5 papas y dos medallones de milanesas diminutos.
Nada que ver a otraS YPF

(Translated by Google)
We stopped for lunch at the gas station. Given the menu prices, we expected something more substantial. The Milanese with potatoes literally came with five potatoes and two tiny Milanese medallions.
Nothing like other YPF restaurants.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTURnMUtpSHpnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Lugar perfecto para pasar la noche. Limpio y cómodo. Salida a la ruta al toque.

(Translated by Google)
Perfect place to spend the night. Clean and comfortable. Hit the road right away.
